chapter_title.ar: باب مَوَارِيثِ الْقَتْلَى وَ مَنْ يَرِثُ مِنَ الدِّيَةِ وَ مَنْ لَا يَرِثُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 34 – Inheritances of the murdered, and who would inherit from the wergild (blood money compensation), and who would not inherit

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/207)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/207)
text: قَالَ الدِّيَةُ يَرِثُهَا الْوَرَثَةُ عَلَى فَرَائِضِ الْمَوَارِيثِ إِلَّا الْإِخْوَةَ مِنَ الْأُمِّ فَإِنَّهُمْ لَا يَرِثُونَ مِنَ الدِّيَةِ شَيْئاً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The wergild, the inheritors would inherit it upon the Obligated inheritances except the brothers from the mother, so they would not be inheriting anything from the wergild’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from ‘Asem ibn Hakim from Muhammad ibn Qays who has narrated the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ’From the wergild the heirs receive according to their ordained shares except brothers and sisters from the mother’s side who do not inherit anything thereof.’”
